description: Lente de Producto: alcance, as-is/to-be, slicing de backlog y FRs con criterios.

checks.why: Sin limites de alcance, todo entra y nada se puede comprometer.

checks.description: Current state and target state are not both explicit enough to compare impact.
checks.why: Sin as-is/to-be no se puede medir el impacto del cambio ni proteger lo que no debe romperse.

checks.description: Backlog slicing signals are not explicit enough: first value slice, workflow paths, variants, rule deferral, or story boundaries are unclear.
checks.why: Las senales de slicing definen el primer corte de valor; si faltan, el backlog nace generico.

checks.description: Functional requirements are not decomposed with source-backed acceptance criteria.
checks.why: Sin FRs con criterios la generacion de specs cae en scaffolding.
